title: helm: Fix file descriptor leak in createFullPath
author: YadavAkhileshh

findings.description: os.OpenFile without O_TRUNC leaves existing files unchanged — intentional per the os.IsExist guard, but worth documenting that createFullPath is idempotent by design.
createFileIfNotThere now correctly distinguishes os.IsNotExist from other stat errors.
Replaced os.Create (0666) with os.OpenFile using defaultNewConfigFileMode (0o644) for consistent permissions.
TestCreateFileIfNotThere covers creation, removability (fd-leak detection), and idempotency.
